blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,437 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
